# dateInterval

**Instance Property**

Access the date interval of the activity segment.

## Declaration

```swift
var dateInterval: DateInterval
```

## Discussion

The [doc://com.apple.DeviceActivity/documentation/DeviceActivity/DeviceActivityFilter/SegmentInterval-swift.enum] that your app requests determines this value.
title: dateInterval
